findings.description: The HTML table for page 2 has an extra column 'Cape Fear – Neuse River Basin Hydrologic Model' with 'EMC Model Approval' entries for rows 1/1/2013, 2/1/2013, 4/1/2013, and 5/1/2013 that do not appear in the original PDF table for those rows.
findings.evidence: PDF shows the 'Cape Fear – Neuse River Basin Hydrologic Model' column as empty for 1/1/2013, and showing 'EMC Model Approval' only at the 2/1/2013 row. The HTML adds 'EMC Model Approval' text to multiple additional rows (1/1/2013, 4/1/2013, 5/1/2013) where the PDF has no such entries.

findings.description: The HTML table adds content to the Cape Fear River Basin Water Supply Plan column for the 11/14/2013 and 9/11/2014 rows that does not exist in the PDF. In the PDF, these rows span across columns with a single merged entry.
findings.evidence: PDF 11/14/2013 row shows a single merged cell spanning Jordan Lake and Cape Fear columns with 'Final Water Supply Plan and DWR's Allocation Recommendations presented at the EMC's November 2013 meeting.' The HTML splits this into separate identical entries in two columns. Similarly, PDF 9/11/2014 shows 'EMC decision at the September 2014 meeting.' spanning across columns, but HTML duplicates the text into separate columns.

findings.description: The 'EMC Model Approval' entry in the Cape Fear – Neuse River Basin Hydrologic Model column is duplicated across multiple rows (1/1/2013, 2/1/2013, 4/1/2013, 5/1/2013) when in the PDF it appears to span only one or two rows around 2/1/2013.
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'EMC Model Approval' appearing once in the Hydrologic Model column around the 2/1/2013 timeframe. HTML repeats it in rows for 1/1/2013, 2/1/2013, 4/1/2013, and 5/1/2013.

findings.description: The 11/14/2013 row in the PDF shows the text spanning across the Jordan Lake and Cape Fear columns as a single merged entry. The HTML duplicates the full text into both the 'Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocations' and 'Cape Fear River Basin Water Supply Plan' columns separately, and similarly for the 9/11/2014 row.
findings.evidence: PDF 11/14/2013: 'Final Water Supply Plan and DWR's Allocation Recommendations presented at the EMC's November 2013 meeting.' appears to span columns. HTML duplicates it in both column 2 and column 3. Same issue for 9/11/2014 row with 'EMC decision at the September 2014 meeting.'

findings.description: There are two h1 elements in the HTML - one for the Agenda page and one for the Jordan Lake schedule page. Only one h1 is acceptable as the document title; the second should be h2.
findings.evidence:
HTML has

Agenda

and

Jordan Lake Water Supply Storage Allocation - Updated Schedule

findings.description: The URL in the PDF footnote is presented as plain text in the HTML rather than as an active hyperlink, but the URL text itself is accurately preserved.
findings.evidence:
PDF: 'http://www.doodle.com/5ctdbuc2n3akshim' — HTML: same text in a

tag without an link.
